description: Structural acceptance check: every business-ready workflow except the Error Handler itself has settings.errorWorkflow set to the real Error Handler (04) workflow ID, and 04's trigger node is a real n8n-nodes-base.errorTrigger so n8n's built-in error-workflow routing has somewhere to deliver a failed execution.

workflows_checked: HMZ - Reply Full Test Harness - Validation

description: End-to-end contract proof (already exercised by the Full Test Harness Z3 node and the local-runtime acceptance script): a forced-error payload delivered to the Error Handler workflow (04), whether via the n8n error-workflow routing path (settings.errorWorkflow + Error Trigger, structurally verified above) or via a direct synthetic Execute Workflow Trigger call with the same shape, produces an idempotent persisted error record.

forced_error.error_message: synthetic forced error for acceptance testing
